calendar.matters:
MOTION Notice Of Motion For And Order Awarding Reasonable Attorneys Fees.
Off Calendar Mar-19-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert P. Gates, Esq., 415-392-5431 ext. 202, appeared on behalf of defendant and moving party Search West Edward E. Schiffer, Esq., 415-772-6424, appeared on behalf of plaintiff and opposing party 100 Pine Street.

After argument the Court adopted its tentative ruling: defendant Search West's motion for an order awarding reasonable attorneys' fees is denied without prejudice to seek fees/costs if defendants ultimately prevail. Hon. James J. McBride. Reporter: Eric Throne CSR #7855 (jjm/md)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-15-2002 Advanced From Feb-15-02 To Jan-25-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Robert P. Gates, Esq. of ERSKINE & TULLEY, A.P.C. 392-5431 for defednat SEARCH WEST, INC. demurring party
Edward E. Schiffer, Esq. of HELLER EHRMAN 772-6000 for Plaintiff opposing party
A R G U E D and the Court took this matter under submission.
